Package com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder

Class GenerationConfigBuilder

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder.GenerationConfigBuilder
  • public class GenerationConfigBuilder
extends Object
    Builder for creating GenerationConfig instances.
    Since:
    0.0.2
    Author:
    Everson Novka <enovka@gmail.com>

      Modifier and Type Method Description
      GenerateContentRequestBuilder and()
      Sets the built GenerationConfig instance as the generation config in the parent builder.

      Builds a GenerationConfig instance based on the configured parameters.
      GenerationConfigBuilder withCandidateCount​(Integer candidateCount)
      Sets the candidate count for the generation config.
      GenerationConfigBuilder withMaxOutputTokens​(Integer maxOutputTokens)
      Sets the maximum output tokens for the generation config.

      Sets the response MIME type for the generation config.

      Creates a new SchemaBuilder for building the response schema.

      Sets the response schema for the generation config.

      Adds a stop sequence to the list of stop sequences for the generation config.

      Sets the temperature for the generation config.

      Sets the topK value for the generation config.

      Sets the topP value for the generation config.

      • build

        public GenerationConfig build()
        Builds a GenerationConfig instance based on the configured parameters.
        Returns:
        The built GenerationConfig instance.

      • and

        public GenerateContentRequestBuilder and()
        Sets the built GenerationConfig instance as the generation config in the parent builder.
        Returns:
        The parent GenerateContentRequestBuilder instance for method chaining.
